name: 01 — Lead Capture

parameters.body:
={
  "business_name": "{{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.business_name }}",
  "niche": "{{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.niche }}",
  "suburb": "{{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.suburb }}",
  "phone": {{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.phone ? '"' + $('Validate Fields').first().json.phone + '"' : 'null' }},
  "cf_turnstile_ok": true,
  "utm_source": {{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_source ? '"' + $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_source + '"' : 'null' }},
  "utm_medium": {{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_medium ? '"' + $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_medium + '"' : 'null' }},
  "utm_campaign": {{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_campaign ? '"' + $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_campaign + '"' : 'null' }},
  "utm_content": {{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_content ? '"' + $('Validate Fields').first().json.utm_content + '"' : 'null' }},
  "referrer_url": {{ $('Validate Fields').first().json.referrer_url ? '"' + $('Validate Fields').first().json.referrer_url + '"' : 'null' }}
}

data.jsonData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Extract Lead ID').first().json.lead_id, business_name: $('Extract Lead ID').first().json.business_name, niche: $('Extract Lead ID').first().json.niche, suburb: $('Extract Lead ID').first().json.suburb }) }}

parameters.responseBody: {"success": false, "error": "Security check failed. Please refresh and try again."}

notes: Triggered by the /landing page 3-field form. Validates Cloudflare Turnstile, writes lead row, responds 200 immediately, then fires workflow 02 asynchronously. Set WORKFLOW_ID_02_GBP_LOOKUP n8n variable to the numeric ID of workflow 02 after import.
